channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-7154] sanity-hsm test_12b: Copytool failed to stop in 20s ...
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Saurabh Tandan <saurabh.tandan@intel.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/664b6714-5a28-11e5-b0a5-5254006e85c2.

The sub-test test_12b failed with the following error:

Copytool failed to stop in 20s ...

Test Log:

== sanity-hsm test 12b: Restore an imported file implicitly == 10:19:57 (1442139597)
CMD: shadow-55vm5 pkill -CONT -x lhsmtool_posix
Purging archive on shadow-55vm5
CMD: shadow-55vm5 rm -rf /tmp/arc1/*
Starting copytool agt1 on shadow-55vm5
CMD: shadow-55vm5 mkdir -p /tmp/arc1
CMD: shadow-55vm5 lhsmtool_posix  --daemon --hsm-root /tmp/arc1 --bandwidth 1 /mnt/lustre2 < /dev/null > /logdir/test_logs/2015-09-13/lustre-reviews-el6_7-x86_64--review-dne-part-2--1_7_1__34541__-69995603353200-045641/sanity-hsm.test_12b.copytool_log.shadow-55vm5.log 2>&1
CMD: shadow-55vm5 mkdir -p /tmp/arc1/d12b.sanity-hsm
CMD: shadow-55vm5 cp -p /etc/hosts /tmp/arc1/d12b.sanity-hsm/f12b.sanity-hsm
CMD: shadow-55vm5 lhsmtool_posix --archive 2 --hsm-root /tmp/arc1		--import d12b.sanity-hsm/f12b.sanity-hsm /mnt/lustre/d12b.sanity-hsm/f12b.sanity-hsm /mnt/lustre
shadow-55vm5: 1442139601.392233 lhsmtool_posix[3364]: action=1 src=d12b.sanity-hsm/f12b.sanity-hsm dst=/mnt/lustre/d12b.sanity-hsm/f12b.sanity-hsm mount_point=/mnt/lustre
shadow-55vm5: 1442139601.394118 lhsmtool_posix[3364]: importing '/mnt/lustre/d12b.sanity-hsm/f12b.sanity-hsm' from '/tmp/arc1/d12b.sanity-hsm/f12b.sanity-hsm'
shadow-55vm5: 1442139601.409497 lhsmtool_posix[3364]: imported '/mnt/lustre/d12b.sanity-hsm/f12b.sanity-hsm' from '/tmp/arc1/0004/0000/0406/0000/0002/0000/0x200000406:0x4:0x0'=='/tmp/arc1/d12b.sanity-hsm/f12b.sanity-hsm'
shadow-55vm5: 1442139601.409737 lhsmtool_posix[3364]: process finished, errs: 0 major, 0 minor, rc=0 (Success)
Verifying released state: 
Verifying file state after restore: 
CMD: shadow-55vm5 diff -q /tmp/arc1/d12b.sanity-hsm/f12b.sanity-hsm /mnt/lustre/d12b.sanity-hsm/f12b.sanity-hsm
CMD: shadow-55vm5 pkill -INT -x lhsmtool_posix
CMD: shadow-55vm5 pgrep -x lhsmtool_posix
shadow-55vm5: 3199
Copytool still running on shadow-55vm5
CMD: shadow-55vm5 pgrep -x lhsmtool_posix
shadow-55vm5: 3199
Copytool still running on shadow-55vm5
CMD: shadow-55vm5 pgrep -x lhsmtool_posix
shadow-55vm5: 3199
Copytool still running on shadow-55vm5
CMD: shadow-55vm5 pgrep -x lhsmtool_posix
shadow-55vm5: 3199
Copytool still running on shadow-55vm5
CMD: shadow-55vm5 pgrep -x lhsmtool_posix
shadow-55vm5: 3199
Copytool still running on shadow-55vm5
CMD: shadow-55vm5 pgrep -x lhsmtool_posix
shadow-55vm5: 3199
Copytool still running on shadow-55vm5
CMD: shadow-55vm5 pgrep -x lhsmtool_posix
shadow-55vm5: 3199
Copytool still running on shadow-55vm5
CMD: shadow-55vm5 pgrep -x lhsmtool_posix
shadow-55vm5: 3199
Copytool still running on shadow-55vm5
CMD: shadow-55vm5 pgrep -x lhsmtool_posix
shadow-55vm5: 3199
Copytool still running on shadow-55vm5
CMD: shadow-55vm5 pgrep -x lhsmtool_posix
shadow-55vm5: 3199
 sanity-hsm test_12b: @@@@@@ FAIL: Copytool failed to stop in 20s ...
item.summary: sanity-hsm test_12b: Copytool failed to stop in 20s ...

status.description: The issue is considered finished, the resolution is correct. Issues which are closed can be reopened.

comments.comment:
another instance seen in master:
https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/3e45127e-60b3-11e5-ba37-5254006e85c2

client and server: lustre-master build# 3192 DNE
